name: The Terraform Seed
description: Activate the dormant planetary seeder by crushing its dormancy DRM chip.

flaws.name: Ping Soil Analyzer
flaws.flavor_text: Ping the dirty soil analyzer, causing it to miscalibrate and falsely flag a critical high-radiation alert.

flaws.name: Deploy Radiation Shield
flaws.flavor_text: The high radiation reading triggers automatic deployment of the heavy lead protective shield. The shield's mechanical arm crushes the DRM dormancy chip.
